label: Knowledge Ingest
description: Ingest content into a Milvus knowledge base via the platform's /api/chat/knowledge/ingest endpoint.

settings.name: collection
settings.label: Collection
settings.description: Target Milvus collection name. Defaults to 'shared'.

settings.name: source
settings.label: Source label
settings.description: Source label stored in the chunk metadata.

settings.name: content
settings.label: Content
settings.description: Content to ingest. If unset, the node falls back to input.output.content / input.content.

ai.shortDescription: Ingest content into the platform knowledge base.
ai.whenToUse: When workflow output should be searchable later via RAG — e.g. crawled web pages, extracted documents, summaries.
ai.examplePrompt: ingest the cleaned document text into the 'support-docs' collection
ai.promptHints: Content < 10 chars is rejected (returns success: false). Reference success via {{steps.<id>.result.success}}.
